address: 109 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10009, USA

sources_checked.limitation: Landing page with links to two PDFs (dinner menu, drink menu); no dish text on the page itself.

Dish names and prices extracted as two separate ordered blocks; positionally matched (counts align 15 dishes / 15 prices, plus 2 desserts and 1 beverage line). No allergen labels beyond a general allergy-notification disclaimer.

Drink menu categories clearly legible (sake, korean spirit, beer, wine, cocktail, non-alcohol); per-item price/row alignment imprecise in places, but sufficient to identify beverage categories, which the project consolidates per category rather than per flavor.
